# arXiv Metadata Draft: ObviousBench: Where Obvious Tasks Still Break Language Models

Title: ObviousBench: Where Obvious Tasks Still Break Language Models

Abstract seed:

ObviousBench is a benchmark for short prompts that should be easy for careful humans but still expose visible failures in language-model settings. The v0.1 `paper_v1` snapshot contains 224 questions and reports 223 model/settings rows.

Public URLs must be regenerated into this draft after artifact publishing.
